name: production-cli-ai-readiness-model
scope: a-Shell mobile CLI AI development system
assessment_chain: requirement -> existing -> missing -> implementation example -> verification

capability_gaps.existing: mapped console commands and explicit API target policy
capability_gaps.missing: granular allow/deny matrix per command, target and mutation class
capability_gaps.implementation_example: settings/mobile-production/tool-policy.json with command ids, mutation scope and approval mode

capability_gaps.existing: JSONL logs and state files under ~/Documents/Developer
capability_gaps.missing: task ids, parent ids, retry count, elapsed time and final artifact references
capability_gaps.implementation_example: ledger rows appended by dev console and loop runtime

capability_gaps.existing: local gate, loop once, evidence flow
capability_gaps.missing: repeat-run consistency, perturbation checks and tool-failure simulation
capability_gaps.implementation_example: run command suites k times with synthetic timeout and missing-file cases

capability_gaps.existing: foreground loop interval and command tail limits
capability_gaps.missing: token/time budget accounting and expensive-failure stop rules
capability_gaps.implementation_example: budget counters in loop runtime and bridge wrapper

capability_gaps.existing: JSONL logs, state files, export reports
capability_gaps.missing: trace ids and span-like task nesting
capability_gaps.implementation_example: task_id, parent_task_id, phase, duration_ms in every log event

capability_gaps.existing: flow registry and API surface catalog
capability_gaps.missing: standard tool schema adapter for external tool protocols
capability_gaps.implementation_example: tool catalog with name, input_schema, output_schema and risk class

capability_gaps.missing: security-focused code checks and proof-oriented regression cases
capability_gaps.implementation_example: bounded static checks plus exploit-free regression examples in tests/

capability_gaps.missing: real host id, project path, health check and restore command

research_branches.unfinished_problem: agents are often evaluated by single-run success instead of consistency under repeated runs and tool faults
research_branches.direct_mobile_implementation: repeat each local command suite k times and record consistency, stderr drift and artifact drift
research_branches.production_value: turns perceived correctness into measurable reliability

research_branches.unfinished_problem: agents can fail expensively by spending too much time or context on unsolvable tasks
research_branches.direct_mobile_implementation: add elapsed time, output size and retry budget to loop runtime and bridge wrapper
research_branches.production_value: prevents expensive failure loops on mobile runtime

research_branches.unfinished_problem: functionally correct changes can still introduce unsafe behavior
research_branches.direct_mobile_implementation: add regression cases and bounded static checks to gate before evidence export
research_branches.production_value: raises correctness from works-now to works-safely

research_branches.unfinished_problem: tool integrations remain fragmented without a shared tool/resource contract
research_branches.direct_mobile_implementation: convert flow commands and API surfaces into a local tool catalog
research_branches.production_value: future external tool connectors can be added without rewriting the CLI

research_branches.unfinished_problem: agent decisions and tool calls are hard to reconstruct after failure
research_branches.direct_mobile_implementation: add task ids, parent ids and duration fields to every JSONL event
research_branches.production_value: makes every run auditable and reproducible
